CHANGE RECORD 
 
When the quality of the products change s, the QuID is updated, and a row is added to this table. The 
third column specifies which Sections or Sub-sections have been updated. The fourth column should 
mention the version of the product to which the change applies.

KEY DEFINITIONS  
 Description 
Date format Throughout this document, the format for dates is DD.MM.YYYY 
Fireworks name of the propagation and storm refocusing algorithm described in 
Husson, 2012 
Level-2 Plus for CFOSAT data: similar to a L2 with some additional information (such 
as flags) 
Level-2 OCeaN for Sentinel 1 data: L2 with the particular Ocean process applied, 
includes information with the OSW process 
Level-2 Ocean SWell for Sentinel 1 data: part of the L2 OCN product with only the information 
pertaining to swell 
Pearson correlation 
coefficient 
In statistics, the Pearson correlation coefficient (PCC)[a] is a correlation 
coefficient that measures linear correlation between two sets of data. 
It is the ratio between the covariance of two variables and the product 
of their standard deviations. 
[from Wikipedia Pearson correlation coefficient] 
Q-Q plot Plot to compare 2 probability distributions by plotting their quantiles 
against each other. A point (x, y) on the plot corresponds to one of the 
quantiles of the second distribution (y-coordinate) plotted against the 
same quantile of the first distribution (x-coordinate).  
[from Wikipedia Q-Q plot] 
SWIM Payload onboard CFOSAT (the satellite), composed by a rotating 
antenna which allow to obtain wave spectra. For more information, see 
https://www.aviso.altimetry.fr/en/missions/current-
missions/cfosat/instruments/swim.html  
TREX Name of CNES’s computing facility (not an Acronym)
